original_data.text: You draw the card when Bandage resolves, not when the damage is actually prevented.

generated_sentences: The ruling with the identifier 1 provides a crucial clarification for the game's complex interactions. (Hash: e0c180e7c4b644bf)
The ruling for the trading card game card was officially issued on 2007-07-15, marking an important update in game regulations. (Hash: 9b21a18da67344f6)
In the heat of the game, remember that you draw the card when Bandage resolves, not when the damage is actually prevented. (Hash: 07564801199c4b4d)
Every time a game player questions a rule, they might refer to ruling 6d268c95-c176-5766-9a46-c14f739aba1c for clarity. (Hash: 21150095b80a4c21)
